case_title: MARINA LEMUS VS. RICARDO ALVARADO RUBEN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-31-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-31-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF MARINA LEMUS IS PRESENT.
